name: Grok
description: Real-time X/Twitter data Tool: https://x.com/grok. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #841 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Grok output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
